title: Define authoritative SCHC ACK-on-Error profile (M=1 N=6 T=0, RuleIDs, WINDOW_SIZE, tiles/ACKs/bitmap/MIC/padding/retries)
description: Update spec/drafts/draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md and spec/appendix-schc.md with exact parameters per RFC 8724 ACK-on-Error. Make this the source of truth for all impls. Link test vectors.
close_reason: Profile defined in spec with M=1 N=6 T=0, WINDOW_SIZE=32, bitmap/MIC/padding/retries detailed; C/Rust/Python constants synchronized; tests updated and passing
